build.buildCommand: npx pnpm@9.15.0 install && npx pnpm@9.15.0 exec turbo run build --filter=api --filter=discord-bot

deploy.startCommand: sh -lc "case \"$SERVICE_ROLE\" in worker) npx pnpm@9.15.0 --filter api worker ;; bot) npx pnpm@9.15.0 --filter discord-bot start ;; *) npx pnpm@9.15.0 --filter api start ;; esac"
